But is competition from off price a growing problem for the value brand?</p> Daphne Howland Fri, 29 May 2026 12:13:00 -0400 https://www.retaildive.com/news/old-navy-fashion-misses-spell-trouble-gap-inc-q1-earnings/821459/ Consumer sentiment falls to new low; cost of living ‘first-order’ worry https://www.retaildive.com/news/consumer-sentiment-falls-cost-living-inflation-Fed/821066/ <figure><div><img src="https://imgproxy.divecdn.com/vCX1UxuhPW8GGitfOFmh6IMAMmEW3ydg-4SauttgibQ/g:ce/rs:fill:1600:900:1/Z3M6Ly9kaXZlc2l0ZS1zdG9yYWdlL2RpdmVpbWFnZS9HZXR0eUltYWdlcy0xNDA4OTUyNzQzLmpwZw==.webp"/></div></figure><p>A sustained rise in long-run inflation expectations would likely increase the odds that the Federal Reserve will raise interest rates.</p> Jim Tyson Fri, 29 May 2026 11:41:00 -0400 https://www.retaildive.com/news/consumer-sentiment-falls-cost-living-inflation-Fed/821066/ The Weekly Closeout: Burlington plots store openings, Mattel expands Brick Shop https://www.retaildive.com/news/rei-union-turns-away-thousands-mattel-brick-shop-expands/821386/ <figure><div><img src="https://imgproxy.divecdn.com/9DoSD_KkJr7KQKnie8YAhiaT20VfB3exn41OyeHyoG0/g:nowe:0:230/c:4032:2278/rs:fill:1600:900:1/Z3M6Ly9kaXZlc2l0ZS1zdG9yYWdlL2RpdmVpbWFnZS9JTUctMDg4My5qcGc=.webp"/></div></figure><p>The off-price retailer plans to open over 100 new locations this year, while the toy company debuted new brick sets featuring Lamborghini and Chevrolet.</p> Retail Dive Staff Fri, 29 May 2026 11:31:00 -0400 https://www.retaildive.com/news/rei-union-turns-away-thousands-mattel-brick-shop-expands/821386/
